commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=d8e56cfe85afbe962d33967f590831590790d199)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds migrated `openai:chatgpt-default` OAuth regression tests and makes the Codex API-key environment-clearing helper resolve an implicit auth profile before falling back to `openai:default`.

PR surface: Source +4, Tests +88. Total +92 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence current-main reproduction is established for this PR’s proposed fix path. The shipped report supplies a concrete migrated-profile failure, but source inspection shows the edited helper already receives the resolved profile from its only caller.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The contributor should first demonstrate the actual failing path and supply real behavior proof; automation cannot infer the missing runtime failure or prove the contributor’s migrated setup.

target.title: fix(codex): honor migrated ChatGPT auth profiles
target.body:
## Summary
- Resolve implicit Codex app-server auth profile handling through the same auth-order path used for login.
- Preserve API-key env clearing for migrated `openai:chatgpt-default` OAuth profiles.
- Add regression coverage for launching with the migrated profile shape from #92458.

## Issue
Fixes #92458

## Real behavior proof
- `pnpm exec vitest run extensions/codex/src/app-server/auth-bridge.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxlint extensions/codex/src/app-server/auth-bridge.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/auth-bridge.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --write extensions/codex/src/app-server/auth-bridge.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/auth-bridge.test.ts && git diff --check`

The new tests build a migrated `openai:chatgpt-default` OAuth profile, verify implicit app-server login sends ChatGPT auth tokens, and verify inherited `CODEX_API_KEY` / `OPENAI_API_KEY` are cleared for the same migrated profile.
target.author: turbotheturtle

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: TurboTheTurtle
